rationale: The cited paper directly studies how stock markets value marketing/R&D-related managerial behavior (myopic cuts) and documents delayed abnormal-return corrections, which is conceptually close to the citing paper’s core framing of capital-market informativeness and managerial learning for marketing decisions. Given this overlap in focal constructs (abnormal returns, marketing intensity, managerial decision-making) and only a DOI-level match without local citation context, this is not safely an obvious mention-only citation and should be reviewed in full.
